title: GPT-6 Is Launching Into a World OpenAI No Longer Controls
summary: The video argues that OpenAI's market dominance is eroding as competitors launch alternative models and integrations. Microsoft, Apple, and Google have reduced dependence on OpenAI by promoting their own LLMs through integrations like Project Polaris, Apple Intelligence with Gemini, and benchmark advances in Claude, while OpenAI deliberated between GPT-5.5 and GPT-6.
writeup: AI Master argues that OpenAI's market dominance is eroding as competitors ship rival models and integrations. The video points to Microsoft, Apple, and Google reducing dependence on OpenAI by promoting their own LLMs through Project Polaris, Apple Intelligence with Gemini, and benchmark gains in Claude, all while OpenAI deliberated between releasing GPT-5.5 and GPT-6. The takeaway is that GPT-6 would arrive in a more contested landscape, where former partners and platform owners increasingly favor alternative models.
